content.body:
Introduces cli/internal/scope with Walk/NearestWritable/FindByLabel,
stopping at $HOME, skipping symlinks, and defaulting missing scope
field to "repo" for backward compatibility. Adds Scope string field
to Config struct (yaml:"scope,omitempty").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: add scope package + Scope field in config
